titleStmt.title: SII 28.148: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 148. (A.R. No. 303 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, north wall.

Records that Umaiyāḻvi, daughter of Turai Araśaṉ alias Vijaya-Nuḷamban of ••• pa-pāḍi alias Nigarilichōḻa-maṇḍalam endowed one vēli and 1(1/2) mā of land after purchasing the same in several plots, out of which 300 kuḻi was allotted for a garden, from several individuals, for preparing a flower garden to supply flowers daily to the temple of Āḷuḍaiyār and for the provison of clothes (ilakkai) and wages (koṟṟu) to three persons who were to tend the garden, each of whom was to supply one kuṟuṇi and 4 nāḻi of flowers per day and was to get one kuṟuṇi and 5 nāḻi of paddy per day for the clothes and as wages. The above expenses were to be met with the balance (iṟai-migudi) of the yield of the plots of land granted (apart from the land on which the garden was to be located) after paying the kaḍamai as fixed by the ūr (ūr māvīnda-kaḍamai). Toṇḍaimāṉ represented to the king to have the benefaction approved, to have the concerned documents entered in the temple register (tirukkaioṭṭi) and to have the record inscribed in the tirumāḷigai and the king gave his assent.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§svastiśrī§ tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājarāja devaṟku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu nāḷ Aimpatteḻiṉāl toṇṭaimāṉum tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyāṉum maturāntaka brahmamārāyaṉum Āḷuṭai
yār koyilukku sāmutāyat tirumāḷikaikkūṟu tillai Ampalappallavaraiyaṉum śrīkāriyañ [ceyvārkaḷum sā]mutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu cey
vārkaḷuñ ceyyat tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi § Āḷuṭaiyārkkuc cāttiyaruḷat tiruppaḷḷittāma ppāṭiyāṉa nikarilicoḻa maṇṭalatturai Aracaṉāṉa vijayanuḷampaṉ makaḷ Umaiyā
ḻvi perumpaṟṟapuliyūr mituṇikkuṭik kavuciyaṉ koṟṟaṉ tirunaṭṭapperumāḷ pakkalum kkuṭik kavuciyaṉ Iḷaiya civaṉ koṟṟaṉ pakkalum kāmakkāṇi nākaṉ satācivaṉ peril Aṉṉiya nā
makaraṇattu vilaikoṇṭa pramāṇappaṭi vaṭapiṭākai maturāntakapperiḷamai nāṭṭu maṇalūrāṉa kaṅkai koṇṭa coḻanallūrppāl śrīcuntaracoḻavatikku meṟku rājarāja vāykkālukkut teṟku mutaṟ kaṇ
ṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattu kollai nilattiṉukkellai vācciyaṉ civaṉ tāyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ perāl jaṉanādhiśvaramuṭaiyār vilaikoṇṭa kollai nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vi
ṟka �rkollaikkut teṟkum Uṭaiyār tiruppuliśvara muṭaiyār kollaikku meṟkum Iṉṉāyiṉār tirunantavaṉattukku vaṭakkum Āka Ivvicainta Iṉṉāṉkellaiyiṉum Aḷantu koḷḷa vanta kuḻimuṉ
ṉūṟum tirunantavaṉañ ceyyavum Ittirunantavaṉañ ceyya muṉṟuper mutal koḷḷavum nāḷ Oṉṟukku Āḷ Oṉṟukku kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyāka vanta tiruppaḷḷittāmam tiruppū maṇṭapattukku mutalāka Aḷakkavum Ippe
rkku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Āḷ Oṉṟukkuk kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyāka vanta nelluppeṟavum peṟumiṭattu meṟpaṭiyāṉ peril Ātrayaṉ niṟaṇintāṉ catācivaṉ pakkal tiriṇāvalāṉa rājarāja nallūrppāl śrīkuntavaivatikku me
ṟku vāṉavaṉ mātevi vāykkālukku vaṭakku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattum Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattum vilaikoṇṭa nilattukkellai cirāka vaṟutikkuk kiḻakkum veḷḷaṟaik kavuciyaṉ Umaippākaṉ Uyyakko
ṇṭa piḷḷai Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattiṉukkut teṟkum kutiraip peruvaḻikku meṟkum veḷḷaṟaik kavuciyaṉ paṭṭaṉ somayājiyār tevaṉ kumaraṉ celvappiḷḷai nampiyār peril vilaikoṇṭu Aṉupavikkiṟa neṟṟik kaṇṇuṭaiyāṉuḷ
ḷiṭṭār nilattiṉukku vaṭakkum Āka Ivvicainta Iṉṉāṉkellaiyiṉum Uṭpaṭṭa nilam Araiyum Iṉṉam meṟpaṭiyāṉ peril veḷḷaṟaikkavuciyaṉ civataṉavāsi tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ pakkal Ivvūṟpāl vilaikoṇṭa Ivvatikku
Ivvāykkālukku vaṭakku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ catirattum muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ catirattum Aṇṭappūñci Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukku Ellai marutuṭaiyāṉoṭaikkuk kiḻakkum poṟiyātāṉ nila
cirākavaṟutikku meṟkum ciṟapput tirunantavaṉappuṟattukku vaṭakkum Āka Ivvicainta Iṉṉāṉkellaiyilum Uṭpaṭṭa karuttaḷavāka mikutik kuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka vanta nilam Eṇmāvaraiyum Āka nilam mukkā
m Ittirunantavaṉakkuṭikaḷukku Ilakkaikkum koṟṟukkum kuṭuttāḷeṉṟum Innilattu Ūrmāvinta kaṭamai Iṟuttu Iṟaimikuti koṇṭu Ittiruppaḷḷittāmam Aḷakkavum Āka Innilam O
ṉṟe Orumāvaraikkum Ivaḷ vilaikoṇṭa sādhanaṅkaḷ tirukkai Oṭṭiyile Oṭukkavum Ippaṭikkut tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavum kaṭavatākappeṟa veṇumeṉṟu toṇṭaimāṉ tāṉ namakkuc coṉṉamai
yil Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyyap paṇṇuvatu Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantira Olai miṉavaṉ muventaveḷāṉ Eṉṟum Ippaṭi tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai toṇṭaimāṉeḻutteṉṟum
Ivai Aṅkarāyaṉeḻutteṉṟum Ivai vayaṉāṭṭā ṉeḻutteṉṟum Ivai cittirāyaṉeḻutteṉṟum Ivai vilāvarāyaṉeḻutteṉṟum Ivai nantipaṉ maṉeḻutteṉṟum prasādañceytaruḷina ceyyumpaṭi paṭi §
Digital edition of SII 28.148 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
